---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in scanning, scoring, reporting, or cross-platform behavior.
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the bug clearly and concisely.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version:
- DIPS version or commit:
- Command executed:

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what happened instead.

## Reproduction Notes

Provide the smallest reproducible example possible. Redact any secrets before posting logs or reports.

## Logs or Report Excerpts

Paste only redacted logs, warnings, or report snippets here.
